build.command: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

start.command: cd backend && python manage.py migrate && sh -c 'if [ -n "$BOT_TOKEN" ]; then BOT_WEBHOOK_URL= python -m bot.main & else echo "BOT_TOKEN is not set; skipping bot"; fi; exec gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT}'
